title: TMSS Group  - Canada.ca
content:
This substance was identified for action under the Chemicals Management Plan (CMP).
- Summary of publications
Public comments on the draft screening assessment
Final screening assessment
Conclusion on section 64 criteria
Follow-up activities
Silanamine, 1,1,1-trimethyl-N-(trimethylsilyl)-, hydrolysis products with silica
None planned at this time
Publication of the final screening assessment. The related notice was  published in the Canada Gazette , Part I: Vol. 156, No. 20.
Publication and start of 60-day public comment period on the draft screening assessment. The related notice was published in the Canada Gazette , Part I: Vol. 154, No. 38 .
